results.question: Is TokenRequiredError defined in textbrush/model/weights.py as a class inheriting from Exception?

evidence.findings: class TokenRequiredError(Exception): defined at line 17 with proper docstring

results.question: Does download_flux_weights() return Path (not None) on successful download?

evidence.findings: Return type annotation '-> Path' at line 138; return Path(snapshot_path) at line 193; test_download_success_returns_path passes

results.question: Does download_flux_weights() raise TokenRequiredError when HF_TOKEN is not set and model is not cached?

evidence.findings: Check at line 180: if not os.environ.get('HF_TOKEN'): raises TokenRequiredError with HF_TOKEN in message

results.question: Does download_flux_weights() NOT require HF_TOKEN when model is already cached?

evidence.findings: Cache check at line 171 before token check at line 180; test_skip_download_if_cached_no_token_needed passes without HF_TOKEN

results.question: Does GatedRepoError from HuggingFace hub raise TokenRequiredError with license message?

evidence.findings: GatedRepoError caught; TokenRequiredError raised with 'Access denied' and 'license' in message

results.question: Does HfHubHTTPError with status 401 or 403 raise TokenRequiredError?

evidence.findings: HfHubHTTPError caught; status_code 401/403 checked; TokenRequiredError raised with HTTP status in message

results.question: Does ensure_flux_available() reference 'textbrush --download-model' instead of 'make download-model'?

evidence.findings: 'textbrush --download-model' referenced at line 135; no 'make download-model' or 'scripts/download_model.py' present

results.question: Do all 20 tests in test_weights.py pass?
Does ruff report zero linting issues for the modified files?
Do the pre-existing 611 passing tests still pass (no regressions introduced)?

evidence.findings: 123/123 tests pass in story-relevant test files

e2e_tests.evidence: 2/2 e2e_smoke tests pass: TestCLIHelp::test_help_shows_all_required_options and TestModelNotFoundMessage::test_model_not_found_references_download_model_flag. Note: 2 skipped (require live model). This project uses CLI subprocess e2e tests (not Playwright/Docker as it is a Python CLI, not a web app).
